summary_angle: 把 static readonly byte[] 字段改为 static ReadOnlySpan<byte> 属性，编译器把数据直接嵌入 PE 程序集，实现零堆分配——.NET Framework 也适用
narrative_flow: 左panel：byte[] → GC 堆上的对象（分配成本）；右panel：ReadOnlySpan<byte> → 数据嵌入程序集（零分配）；下方信息块：三条限制规则
main_conclusion: static ReadOnlySpan<byte> 属性 = 编译器特性，数据嵌入 PE metadata，无堆分配，.NET Framework 同样受益

information_blocks.label: byte[]
information_blocks.anchor: static readonly byte[] ByteField = new byte[]{1,2,3,4}

information_blocks.label: ReadOnlySpan<byte>
information_blocks.visual: PE 文件内嵌，零分配，标 ✓ 号

information_blocks.label: 仅 byte/sbyte/bool
information_blocks.anchor: 只适用单字节类型，int 不行

comic_style_reason: 文章属于 analysis 类型（对比分析 + IL 代码验证），按规则自动选择 american-comic：粗轮廓、halftone、graphic-novel 式对照与张力

RIGHT PANEL shows the same developer smiling, screen shows 'ReadOnlySpan<byte>', a green checkmark above a PE assembly file icon with bytes embedded inside it, labeled '零分配'. At the bottom: three small info-badges reading '仅 byte/sbyte/bool', '仅常量', 'ReadOnly 专用'. No text other than these short Chinese labels. Dark navy and amber color palette.
